headlines.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a primary for the first time since his Trump impeachment vote
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s political career is at stake on Saturday as Louisiana voters weigh in on the Republican for the first time since he voted to convict President Donald Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial

headlines.title: Bulgaria wins the Eurovision Song Contest with Dara’s ‘Bangaranga’
headlines.description: VIENNA — Bulgaria triumphed on Saturday night at the Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna, held under the shadow of controversy over the continued participation of Israel

headlines.title: As Hormuz crisis rattles the world, eyes are on another key waterway
headlines.description: As the crisis in the Strait of Hormuz drags on, guardians of another critical waterway are worried about the precedent it sets for any future clash between the United States and China.

headlines.title: Kash Patel’s visit to Capitol Hill gets heated, and a walk in the Beatles’ footsteps: The news quiz
headlines.description: A moment of self-awareness in the Senate, a double murder conviction gets overturned, and a trailblazing basketball player dies.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Bulgaria wins the Eurovision Song Contest with Dara’s ‘Bangaranga’
headlines.description: VIENNA — Bulgaria triumphed on Saturday night at the Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna, held under the shadow of controversy over the continued participation of Israel

headlines.title: Ice cream sold in 17 states recalled over possible metal contamination
headlines.description: California-based Straus Family Creamery is recalling multiple organic ice cream products in pint and quart sizes due to the potential presence of metal fragments, according to a notice published Friday by the Food and Drug Administration

headlines.title: Swatch stores shutter amid long lines for highly anticipated collaboration release
headlines.description: Chaos erupted at Swatch stores from New York to London as watch enthusiasts lined up for a highly anticipated new release — only for the massive crowds to force several locations to shut their doors

headlines.title: Canadian MV Hondius cruise passenger tests positive for hantavirus
headlines.description: A Canadian who was a passenger on the MV Hondius cruise ship has tested positive for the Andes hantavirus, the Public Health Agency of Canada announced Saturday

headlines.title: Man rescued in Florida plane crash is accused of smuggling cocaine
headlines.description: A passenger on board the plane that crashed into the ocean off the coast of Florida earlier this week has been arrested on cocaine smuggling charges

headlines.title: London police out in force to deal with rival rallies and a soccer final
headlines.description: Police patrolled the streets of London as tens of thousands of protesters descended on the U.K. capital on Saturday for two rival demonstrations, and tens of thousands more soccer fans congregated for the final of England’s major domestic cup competition at Wembley Stadium

headlines.title: Texas mom charged with capital murder after kids found dead in burnt car
headlines.description: A mother was arrested Friday after her two children were found dead in a car that was lit on fire in San Antonio
